item.title: GAME DOMAIN - NRGD [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAME DOMAIN - NRGD [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME DOMAIN - NRGD
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module by revWhiteShadow: Elevate Your Gaming Experience
The GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module which No Root users can use with shizuku , developed by revWhiteShadow, is a tribute to the anime world's dynamic power moves, inspired by Jujutsu Kaisen's "Domain Expansion." Just as Domain Expansion signifies an overwhelming force, the GAME DOMAIN module brings an unparalleled gaming experience to your Android device.

Game-Specific Kernel Tweaks: 30 Game Tweak Enhancements

GAME DOMAIN caters to a wide range of popular games, providing dedicated kernel tweaks to optimize your gaming sessions. Here are the 23 game-specific kernel tweaks that have been meticulously added:

1. PUBG Mobile (PUBGM)
2. Call of Duty: Mobile (CODM)
3. Genshin Impact
4. Free Fire
5. Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
6. Asphalt 9: Legends
7. Apex Legends Mobile
8. Arena of Valor
9. Critical Ops
10. Dead by Daylight Mobile
11. Mobile Legends: Adventure
12. Black Desert Mobile
13. Injustice 2
14. World War Heroes: WW2 FPS
15. Star Wars: Force Arena
16. Shadowgun Legends
17. Standoff 2
18. Battle Prime
19. Super Mecha Champions
20. Free Fire Max
21. PUBG Mobile Lite
22. Call of Duty: Warzone
23. Tanks A Lot! - Realtime Multiplayer Battle Arena
24. F1 Mobile Racing
25. Real Racing
26. BGMI (Battlegrounds Mobile India)
27. Arena Breakout
28. Minecraft
29. CARxSTREET
30. Diablo Immortal

GAME DOMAIN ensures that each game receives specific optimizations tailored to its requirements. Whether you're battling in the intense landscapes of PUBG Mobile, exploring the fantastical realm of Genshin Impact, or racing through the tracks of Real Racing, this module has you covered.

Revitalize your gaming sessions with GAME DOMAIN and experience the power of dedicated kernel tweaks that enhance performance, graphics, and overall gameplay. Elevate your gaming to the next level and embrace the Domain Expansion of your Android gaming experience.
[read more]

item.title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.description:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]

item.title: QXGEdit [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QXGEdit [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QXGEdit
(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

[read more]
item.description:
QXGEdit
(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QXGEdit
(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

[read more]

item.title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.description:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]

item.title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.description:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]

item.title: Standard Barcode Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Standard Barcode Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: businesscardmaker
item.itunes:summary:
Standard Barcode Maker
(Office Apps)
Technically sound standard Barcode Maker software provides advance facility to craft attractive series of unique barcode stickers used for telecom industries. Recommended barcode label crafter program facilitates users to create tags printed at different product labels in different shape, size and color without being requiring expert knowledge.
[read more]
item.description:
Standard Barcode Maker
(Office Apps)
Technically sound standard Barcode Maker software provides advance facility to craft attractive series of unique barcode stickers used for telecom industries. Recommended barcode label crafter program facilitates users to create tags printed at different product labels in different shape, size and color without being requiring expert knowledge.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Standard Barcode Maker
(Office Apps)
Technically sound standard Barcode Maker software provides advance facility to craft attractive series of unique barcode stickers used for telecom industries. Recommended barcode label crafter program facilitates users to create tags printed at different product labels in different shape, size and color without being requiring expert knowledge.
[read more]

item.title: GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GS Graphic Renderings Tweak is a powerful tool designed to enhance the graphic rendering capabilities of Android devices. With this tweak, users have the freedom to choose between three advanced rendering options: OpenGL ES, Sikagl, and VulkanSika.
OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.
[read more]
item.description:
GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GS Graphic Renderings Tweak is a powerful tool designed to enhance the graphic rendering capabilities of Android devices. With this tweak, users have the freedom to choose between three advanced rendering options: OpenGL ES, Sikagl, and VulkanSika.
OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.
[read more]

(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GS Graphic Renderings Tweak is a powerful tool designed to enhance the graphic rendering capabilities of Android devices. With this tweak, users have the freedom to choose between three advanced rendering options: OpenGL ES, Sikagl, and VulkanSika.
OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.
[read more]

item.title: Inner Breeze [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: Inner Breeze [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: waotzi
item.itunes:summary:
Inner Breeze
(Education Apps)
A guided breathing meditation app based on the Wim Hof Breathing Method designed to help you rediscover inner peace, reduce stress, and enhance mindfulness in moments.

[read more]
item.description:
Inner Breeze
(Education Apps)
A guided breathing meditation app based on the Wim Hof Breathing Method designed to help you rediscover inner peace, reduce stress, and enhance mindfulness in moments.

[read more]

(Education Apps)

[read more]
